pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB runtime dependency required because JAXB was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime for javax.xml.bind classes when running on JDK 11+ without explicit dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta XML Bind API dependency to replace the removed javax.xml.bind API in JDK 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.xml.bind does not exist when running on JDK 11+ without explicit dependency.
